description: Referencing sturdy and comfy driving shoes, this well-heeled pair from homme is perfect for a dressy casual or toned down semi formal vibe. Style this with tonal accessories.UpperPointed toe cup with a leather upperTextured patterning and a brand badge on the upperReinforced overlay at the heelStitch detail on the toe boxLeather liningPadded footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel and textured patterning for gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a leather brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
